meaning: n.瑙ｉ櫎鎵胯 鑳屽純涔夊姟
examples: Another main result was composition of bit equivocable commitment scheme satisfied with our new definition and could be composed to a secure selective decommitment scheme.
In this paper, a commitment scheme against selective decommitment attacking was named as a selective decommitment scheme which was composition of general bit commitment schemes.
